description: Master registry of all membrane system transition compatibility classifications

compatibility_classes.COMPATIBLE: Systems can transition directly with standard detailing
compatibility_classes.CONDITION_REQUIRED: Transition permitted only with specific materials and conditions met
compatibility_classes.FLASHING_REQUIRED: Dedicated flashing assembly mandatory; direct contact not permitted
compatibility_classes.INCOMPATIBLE: Systems must not be used in same roof assembly; no approved transition

transitions.notes: EPDM oils degrade PVC. No approved transition detail.
EPDM tape flashing required as isolator at transition.
Modified bitumen cant strip and protection board required at transition.
